The absolute, massive explosion of the Hansie Cronje match-fixing scandal completely consumed the Indian sporting and legal establishment. The Indian government heavily authorized the Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) to aggressively launch a massive, comprehensive federal probe into the deep-rooted corruption. In Andhra Pradesh, Chief Minister Chandrababu Naidu aggressively fought to maintain his state's massive, global high-tech image despite the severe, ongoing agricultural crisis. He fiercely leveraged the recent, massive diplomatic triumph of the US Presidential visit to aggressively court foreign investors, successfully announcing new, massive multi-million dollar corporate commitments for software development centers within Hyderabad's HITEC City. The state's massive, deeply impoverished agricultural sector remained locked in a deeply volatile, highly critical crisis. On April 23, 1564 (Traditional Date), William Shakespeare, the absolute, undisputed greatest playwright in the massive history of the English language, was born in Stratford-upon-Avon, England (he also famously died on this exact same date in 1616). Following decades of massive, incredibly brutal guerrilla warfare heavily led by the SWAPO liberation movement against the racist South African occupying forces, the newly independent republic was heavily admitted into the United Nations. The massive, deeply celebrated event marked one of the absolute final, major massive victories in the global decolonization of the African continent.
